release_notes:
v23.05.5 Major Workflow Update:
- Made Team Board dropdowns 100% scroll-proof to prevent accidental reassignments
- Added Interactive Shape List panel to the Visual QA Editor
- Added rapid-fire auto-delete capability (Hold Delete to machine-gun shapes)
- Added permanent, dynamically-sliding ID numbers to the outside edges of shapes
- Upgraded shape labels with Constant Screen Scaling (zoom-proof text)
- Fixed 'Ghosting' and text-blocking bugs during shape resizing
